utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. Each item is also fully detailed according to the requirements—each includes cost information, coverage descriptions, and specifics (like benefits lists). llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan includes LifeFirst as the provider for health, property, and travel coverage. In the ground-truth ratings, LifeFirst appears in multiple standard-tier options. For health coverage, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' exists both under physical_health (rating 8) and mental_health (rating 8). For property coverage, 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under home_content has a rating of 8. For travel coverage, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under travel_insurance has a rating of 7. The additional services listed — premium membership, travel assistance service, and gym membership reimbursement — correspond to rated services in the general_services and health_enhancement_services sections: 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 10), '24/7 Travel Assistance' (rating 9), and 'Gym Membership Reimbursement' (rating 5). Mapping each selected plan and service to its rating gives the following results.
